products.name: SQA eVTOL
products.descriptor: Blended-wing VTOL UAS for ISR, up to 3h endurance, 40 km range

evidence.snippet:
SQA eVTOL
---------
*   up to 3h
*   80xEO/8xIR/ Lidar
*   160 km
*   Failsafe parachute

products.name: Bramor C4EYE
products.descriptor: Battlefield-proven fixed-wing ISR UAS, up to 3.5h endurance, encrypted datalink

evidence.snippet:
Bramor C4EYE
============
Battlefield and special OPS proven

The field proven BRAMOR C4EYE UAS line is suitable for operations where real-time or near real time video observation and surveillance capability is of utmost importance. With an endurance of up to 3 hours, a standard data and payload link of up to 40km LOS, or the optional MANET digital communications capabilities.

products.name: MWT (Medi Wing Tactical)
products.descriptor: High-speed stealthy blended-wing tactical delivery UAS, 60 km range, up to 300 km/h

evidence.snippet: C-Astral Aerospace Unveils new, stealthy MWT (Medi Wing Tactical) Delivery Drone and AwardWinning SQA2 eVTOL Augmented by Auterion at AUVSI Xponential 2025

C-Astral will also debut a game-changing delivery drone at Xponential, enhanced by Auterion’s autonomous targeting capabilities and C-Astral’s proprietary datalinks. This high-speed, stealthy UAS, with anti-radar materials and GPS-independent operation, redefines tactical logistics for secure, rapid payload delivery in challenging environments.

products.notes: Debuted at AUVSI Xponential 2025; no buy/order language present in corpus.

products.name: ATLAS AS90X

evidence.snippet:
ATLAS AS90X
===========
Advanced Technology Light Acquisition System

ATLAS AS90X
-----------
*   < 90 min
*   EO 40x/ IR 4x / LI
*   90 km
*   15 km2
*   Para
*   Water resistant

products.name: C3P Software
products.descriptor: Command, control, communications and mission planning software for C-Astral UAS

evidence.snippet: With C3P you can plan and execute your flight missions, control the flight parameters and sensors in real-time and collect and aggregate geospatial data.

products.notes: Dedicated product page (/en/c3p-software) was skipped; classified from references across product pages.

products.name: Bramor ppX
products.descriptor: Survey-grade PPK fixed-wing UAS for photogrammetry, sub-centimeter GSD, 3.5h endurance

evidence.snippet: The BRAMOR ppX (GNSS PPK - Post Processing Kinematic) UAS is ideally suited for surveying and remote sensing applications that need a fast high precision set of results, down to sub-centimeter GSD level also in the absence of a grid of ground control points.

products.name: DYN Micro Datalink
products.descriptor: Micro datalink for C-Astral UAS platforms
products.notes: Dedicated product page (/en/dyn-micro-datalink) was skipped; classified from navigation listing and brochure download reference on SQA eVTOL page.

products.name: Bramor aGX
products.descriptor: Multispectral fixed-wing UAS for precision agriculture mapping, up to 3h endurance

evidence.snippet:
Bramor aGX
==========
Revolutionary agriculture remote sensing system
Discover the revolutionary precision agriculture service for smart fertilizer application, based on multispectral UAS mapping and soil sample analysis. See deeper - Fertilize smarter!

products.name: EYE-X HD
products.descriptor: Stabilized EO/IR multi-sensor gimbal camera family for C-Astral UAS platforms

evidence.snippet: _The stabilized C-Astral EYE-X family of gimbals provides electro-optical CCD and state of the art un-cooled micro-bolometer based thermal imaging capabilities with the optional laser illuminator_

products.notes: Multiple variants noted in corpus: HD1, HD4, HD8. Supplied as standard payload with SQA eVTOL, ATLAS AS90X, and Bramor C4EYE.
